summary: Made one surgical entry-continuity edit to carry chapter 2's handoff into the Blue Hour opening. The exit already cleanly establishes the restoration desk that chapter 4 assumes, so no closing rewrite was needed. No `example_lines` field was present in the supplied style bible, so no calibration-line replacements were required.
edits: Added a brief reference to Sloan's number still tucked behind Mira's badge so the opening directly picks up the final image from chapter 2.
Retained the existing opening construction because it is structurally distinct from the visible chapter 4 opening.
Left the chapter ending intact because it already hands off into chapter 4's established Blue Hour operation.
